reviews.review_description:
I grabbed this game because it looked cool and you can't beat the price! Boy, it is a lot packed in here and the dev plans to release more based on the "coming soon" level buttons.

It has a little bit of everything to keep you happy.  

Love it!
It’s fun don’t get me wrong but I can’t find the key on the BIG TOOTHED farm hand . Love the story behind the game tho. If any one know where the key is on The second level please let me know

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review.  I'm glad you like the game.  The key is inside the shed with flowers around it.
